requirement_topic.en: KS IEC 60335-2-40 Electrical Safety — Heat Pumps, Air Conditioners and Dehumidifiers
requirement_topic.zh: KS IEC 60335-2-40电气安全——热泵、空调器及除湿机
requirement_topic.zht: KS IEC 60335-2-40電氣安全——熱泵、空調器及除濕機

summary.en: KEBS has adopted KS IEC 60335-2-40 as the applicable Kenya Standard for the safety of electrically operated heat pumps, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers. This standard is aligned with IEC 60335-2-40 and covers electrical, mechanical, and thermal safety requirements for products intended for use at Kenya's grid voltage (240 V single-phase, 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz). Compliance with KS IEC 60335-2-40 is assessed as part of the KEBS PVOC pre-shipment inspection process. Test reports and technical documentation must demonstrate conformity at 240 V / 50 Hz. Exporters should note that the Kenyan supply voltage (240 V) is higher than the standard Chinese domestic supply (220 V), which may affect component ratings, insulation class, and thermal cutout settings.
summary.zh: KEBS采用KS IEC 60335-2-40作为电动热泵、空调器和除湿机安全的适用肯尼亚标准。该标准与IEC 60335-2-40接轨，涵盖适用于肯尼亚电网电压（单相240 V、三相415 V、50 Hz）产品的电气、机械和热安全要求。KS IEC 60335-2-40合规性在KEBS PVOC装船前检验过程中进行评估。测试报告和技术文件须证明在240 V / 50 Hz下的符合性。出口商应注意肯尼亚供电电压（240 V）高于中国标准家用供电（220 V），这可能影响元器件额定值、绝缘等级和热断路设定。
summary.zht: KEBS採用KS IEC 60335-2-40作為電動熱泵、空調器和除濕機安全的適用肯尼亞標準。該標準與IEC 60335-2-40接軌，涵蓋適用於肯尼亞電網電壓（單相240 V、三相415 V、50 Hz）產品的電氣、機械和熱安全要求。KS IEC 60335-2-40合規性在KEBS PVOC裝船前檢驗過程中進行評估。測試報告和技術文件須證明在240 V / 50 Hz下的符合性。出口商應注意肯尼亞供電電壓（240 V）高於中國標準家用供電（220 V），這可能影響元器件額定值、絕緣等級和熱斷路設定。

standards_or_laws: KS IEC 60335-2-40 (Kenya Standard — Safety of heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for heat pumps and household air conditioners is GB 4706.32, which is harmonised with IEC 60335-2-40 but tested at Chinese grid conditions (220 V, 50 Hz). CCC certification requires factory audit and type testing to GB 4706.32 by a CNCA-designated certification body. While GB 4706.32 and KS IEC 60335-2-40 share the same IEC parent standard, CCC certification and GB 4706.32 test reports at 220 V are not accepted as KEBS PVOC conformity evidence at 240 V, and component ratings must be verified for the higher Kenyan voltage.
summary.zh: 中国热泵和家用空调器的强制安全标准为GB 4706.32，与IEC 60335-2-40接轨，但在中国电网条件（220 V、50 Hz）下测试。CCC认证须由CNCA指定认证机构对GB 4706.32进行工厂审核和型式测试。尽管GB 4706.32和KS IEC 60335-2-40共享同一IEC母标准，但在220 V下的CCC认证和GB 4706.32测试报告不被接受为240 V下的KEBS PVOC符合性证据，元器件额定值须针对肯尼亚较高电压进行核实。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵和家用空調器的強制安全標準為GB 4706.32，與IEC 60335-2-40接軌，但在中國電網條件（220 V、50 Hz）下測試。CCC認證須由CNCA指定認證機構對GB 4706.32進行工廠審核和型式測試。儘管GB 4706.32和KS IEC 60335-2-40共享同一IEC母標準，但在220 V下的CCC認證和GB 4706.32測試報告不被接受為240 V下的KEBS PVOC符合性證據，元器件額定值須針對肯尼亞較高電壓進行核實。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 (China mandatory safety standard — heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers)
GB 9237 (China — refrigerating systems and heat pumps safety)

gap.en: CCC and GB 4706.32 test reports at 220 V do not satisfy KEBS PVOC conformity requirements at 240 V. Exporters must provide test evidence to KS IEC 60335-2-40 at 240 V / 50 Hz to the KEBS-approved inspection body. Component ratings (capacitors, motors, insulation, thermal cutouts) must be verified for 240 V operation. The 50 Hz frequency is the same in both markets, which reduces frequency-related re-testing scope, but voltage differences require explicit addressing in the technical file.
gap.zh: 在220 V下的CCC和GB 4706.32测试报告不满足240 V下的KEBS PVOC符合性要求。出口商须向KEBS认可的检验机构提供在240 V / 50 Hz下符合KS IEC 60335-2-40的测试证据。元器件额定值（电容器、电机、绝缘、热断路器）须针对240 V运行进行核实。两个市场的频率同为50 Hz，这减少了与频率相关的重新测试范围，但电压差异须在技术文件中明确说明。
gap.zht: 在220 V下的CCC和GB 4706.32測試報告不滿足240 V下的KEBS PVOC符合性要求。出口商須向KEBS認可的檢驗機構提供在240 V / 50 Hz下符合KS IEC 60335-2-40的測試證據。元器件額定值（電容器、電機、絕緣、熱斷路器）須針對240 V運行進行核實。兩個市場的頻率同為50 Hz，這減少了與頻率相關的重新測試範圍，但電壓差異須在技術文件中明確說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KS IEC 60335-2-40 conformity assessed as part of KEBS PVOC pre-shipment inspection
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory GB 4706.32 under CCC for domestic Chinese market; not equivalent to KS IEC 60335-2-40 PVOC evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Significant gap — KS IEC 60335-2-40 conformity at 240 V / 50 Hz is required for KEBS PVOC; CCC and GB 4706.32 evidence at 220 V is not accepted; component ratings for 240 V operation must be verified and documented in the technical file submitted to the KEBS-approved inspection body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——KEBS PVOC要求在240 V / 50 Hz下符合KS IEC 60335-2-40；在220 V下的CCC和GB 4706.32证据不被接受；必须核实元器件在240 V运行下的额定值，并在提交给KEBS认可检验机构的技术文件中加以记录。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——KEBS PVOC要求在240 V / 50 Hz下符合KS IEC 60335-2-40；在220 V下的CCC和GB 4706.32證據不被接受；必須核實元器件在240 V運行下的額定值，並在提交給KEBS認可檢驗機構的技術文件中加以記錄。
